Tai Chong ŤáļŚīá
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tai Chong (ŤáļŚīá). Executed by Cao Cao. Tai Chong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Tai Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
